attributes.description: Alerts when 4xx responses exceed 15% of access logs. High client-error rate indicates broken links or client/bot activity.
attributes.name: [Nginx OTel] High 4xx error rate

investigation_guide.blob:
## NGINX high 4xx error rate

### What fired
4xx response rate exceeded 15% over the window (min 50 total requests).

### Why it matters
4xx errors are client-side — bad requests, missing resources, unauthorised access. Sudden spikes often reflect broken deployments or bot traffic.

### Triage
1. Inspect top URLs returning 4xx.
2. Check client IP distribution for botting.

### Remediation
- Fix broken URLs / routing.
- Block abusive clients at the edge.

### Tuning
- 15% threshold; tune to site.
